segments.text: I thought he might've gone for that intentionally, but...
segments.original_text: あえて当たりに行ったのかなと思ったけど

segments.text: The spacing here is a bit...
segments.original_text: ここでビジョンはちょっと

full_text: I thought he might've gone for that intentionally, but... The spacing here is a bit... Whoa!
